rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"getAuthService() was a private module-level singleton in withAuth.ts — had to export it for route handler reuse","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Route handlers return new Response(JSON.stringify(...), {status, headers}) — no framework wrappers, pure Next.js Response","scope":"src/app/api"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"AuthService.login() throws {message, status} errors; catch err.status to set HTTP response — no Result type needed at route boundary","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Test files are co-located next to route files as *.test.ts, using vi.useFakeTimers() and NextRequest construction","scope":"src/app/api"},{"kind":"convention","text":"CORS headers are present on other routes and should be included on new auth routes for consistency","scope":"src/app/api"}]}
